campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review the Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority's financial report for March 2026 and passed a policy limiting city property use for federal civil enforcement activities. The council also discussed staffing challenges and recruitment efforts for city positions.
keyTopics: Transportation Authority's March 2026 investment report
New policy restricting city property use for federal civil enforcement
City job vacancies and recruitment retention strategies

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing to decide whether to clean up hazardous conditions on certain properties that the County identified. They also adopted a new technology policy for the city and approved a process for residents to request accommodations.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property cleanup and resident objections
Council approval to order abatement work on County-identified properties
New Technology Disruption Policy replacing previous city guidelines
Process established for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve routine meeting minutes, review the town's finances from March, and authorize several agreements and contracts. The council also approved grant applications and a list of projects for the upcoming fiscal year.
keyTopics: Approved a donation of an Automated External Defibrillator (AED) to the town
Authorized a five-year services agreement with an unnamed vendor
Approved a construction contract with O'Grady Paving
Submitted grant applications for a statewide program
Adopted a project list for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agendas and update committee work plans. The council cancelled their May 26 meeting and reviewed draft items for their June 2 meeting, while also updating work plans for neighborhood services, education, and government rules committees.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26, 2026 council meeting
Adding new items to June 2 draft agenda
Updated Neighborhood Services and Education Committee Work Plan
Updated Rules and Open Government Committee Work Plan
Approval of various community events sponsored by council districts

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the upcoming fiscal year. The council also reviewed agendas for various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member selection for fiscal year 2026-27
Public comment period for residents
Approval of previous meeting minutes
Review of upcoming board and commission agendas

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council met on May 19, 2026, to conduct regular business and recognize Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The meeting included approval of April meeting minutes and a flag salute to open the session.
keyTopics: Recognition of Asian Pacific American Heritage Month
Recognition of Affordable Housing Month
Approval of April meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety Element of its long-term general plan (2015-2040), recognized the Public Works Department during National Public Works Week, and acknowledged Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month.
keyTopics: Health and Safety Element update to the 2015-2040 General Plan
Public Works Department recognition covering roads, trees, facilities, and environmental programs
Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month acknowledgment

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss plans related to the station area. The full agenda details were cut off in the provided document, so the specific topics covered are unclear.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they voted on several land development and zoning matters, including approving a site development permit change and map for a development project. The council also made a permanent appointment for a new City Manager and considered new local regulations through public hearings and votes.
keyTopics: Site Development Permit Amendment and Vesting Tentative Map approved
New City Manager appointed permanently
Public hearings on new local ordinances and regulations
Assessment resolution confirmed

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council discussed plans to help residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles for electrification programs designed to help the city comply with regional air quality regulations.
keyTopics: Residential electrification status update - progress on converting homes to electric systems
Proposed principles for electrification assistance programs
Air District regulation compliance requirements
Staff presentation and council member announcements
